title: RSA Encryption, Signatures, and Safe Migration · Runtime Contract: Crypto Go Rsa Key Validation
summary: A service encrypts large payloads directly with textbook RSA, verifies PKCS#1 v1.5 signatures by default, and accepts any PEM key without purpose or size validation. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the rsa key validation increment in RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.
Keep small-number demonstrations outside production code and name the parameter, randomness, validation, and side-channel evidence they omit.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Rsa Key Validation · Theory Crypto Go Rsa Key Validation
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 2829 during a backup restoration drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate RSA on trusted keys, OAEP or PSS purpose, payload limits, and uniform failure; retain exact canonical bytes, purpose, role, version, and artifact identity; then swap the role, tenant, recipient, algorithm, or context and prove domain separation. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.
